flavor_text.en: Its scientific name is Oddium wanderus. It is said to cover distances as far as 1,000 feet when night falls, walking on its two roots.

text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à chacun des Pokémon de Banc (les vôtres et ceux de votre adversaire). (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi et Empoisonné.

text.en: If this Pokémon was healed during this turn, this attack does 120 more damage.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a été soigné pendant ce tour, cette attaque inflige 120 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: The bud bursts into bloom with a bang. It then starts scattering allergenic, poisonous pollen.

text.en: If this Pokémon was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does that much more damage.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a subi les dégâts d'une attaque pendant le dernier tour de votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige en plus ce montant-là de dégâts.

text.en: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.
text.fr: Défaussez les 2 cartes du dessus du deck de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: The leaf on its head is naturally dirt repellent and will stay clean even after transporting Pokémon that are covered in mud.

text.en: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 30 dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It prefers waterfronts with plentiful food. It became nocturnal so it wouldn't have to compete for food with bird Pokémon.
There are structures throughout its whole body that produce energy when hit by sound waves with a cheerful rhythm.

text.en: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon for each {G} Energy attached to this Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire pour chaque Énergie {G} attachée à ce Pokémon. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it's in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.

text.en: Shuffle this Pokémon and all attached cards into your deck.
text.fr: Mélangez avec votre deck ce Pokémon et toutes les cartes qui lui sont attachées.

flavor_text.en: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.
The flame on its tail shows the strength of its life-force. If Charmander is weak, the flame also burns weakly.
When it swings its burning tail, the temperature around it rises higher and higher, tormenting its opponents.

text.en: Discard any amount of {R} Energy from among your Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
text.fr: Défaussez autant d'Énergies {R} que vous le voulez parmi vos Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts pour chaque carte défaussée de cette façon.

text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est un Pokémon-ex, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: There are stories of this Pokémon using its radiant, flame-cloaked wings to light up paths for those lost in the mountains.

text.en: This attack does 20 more damage for each {R} Energy attached to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie {R} attachée à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This popular symbol of good fortune will never fall over in its sleep, no matter how it's pushed or pulled.

text.en: This attack does 40 more damage for each {R} Energy attached to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie {R} attachée à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon's power level rises along with the temperature of its fire, which can reach 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 60 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 60 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: According to myth, if people ignore truth and let themselves become consumed by greed, Reshiram will arrive to burn their kingdoms down.

text.en: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 2 cartes Énergie de base, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

text.en: Discard 4 Basic {R} Energy cards from your hand. If you can't discard 4 cards in this way, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Défaussez 4 cartes Énergie {R} de base de votre main. Si vous ne pouvez pas défausser 4 cartes de cette façon, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

text.en: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 20 dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: The protrusion on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It sleeps under shallow ocean waters during the day, then looks for food at night when it's colder.
It searches for food by digging into the ground with its snout. Even frozen ground doesn't give it any trouble.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Covered by a shaggy coat, it is resistant to the cold. Its tusks of ice thicken when it snows.

text.en: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 120 more damage. Then, discard that Stadium.
text.fr: Si un Stade est en jeu, cette attaque inflige 120 dégâts supplémentaires. Ensuite, défaussez ce Stade.

text.en: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: A frozen Mamoswine was dug from ice dating back 10,000 years. This Pokémon has been around a long, long, long time.

text.en: If you have at least 4 {W} Energy in play, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: Si vous avez au moins 4 Énergies {W} en jeu, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Said to be the embodiment of north winds, it can instantly purify filthy, murky water.

text.en: Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck une carte Supporter, montrez-la, puis ajoutez-la à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: A poor walker, it often falls down. However, its strong pride makes it puff up its chest without a care.

text.en: This attack does 70 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: It lives a solitary life. Its wings deliver wicked blows that can snap even the thickest of trees in half with a single hit.

text.en: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez toutes les Énergies de ce Pokémon.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: This gluttonous Pokémon only assists people with their work because it wants treats. As it runs, it crackles with electricity.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 70 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It sends electricity through its legs to boost their strength. Running at top speed, it easily breaks 50 mph.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do 30 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, les attaques utilisées par le Pokémon Défenseur infligent 30 dégâts de moins (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

flavor_text.en: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.
When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.

text.en: You may have this Pokémon also do 60 damage to itself and make your opponent's Active Pokémon Paralyzed.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon peut s'infliger aussi 60 dégâts et rendre le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire Paralysé.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.
This Pokémon startles people in the middle of the night. It gathers fear as its energy.

text.en: You may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.
text.fr: Vous pouvez piocher des cartes jusqu'à en avoir 6 en main.

flavor_text.en: In truth, it is a cowardly Pokémon. It growls eagerly in order to hide its fear from its opponent.

text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire a déjà au moins un marqueur de dégâts, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If attacked, it desperately flails its limbs about in an attempt to repel its opponent.

text.en: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic {P} Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 2 cartes Énergie {P} de base, puis attachez-les à ce Pokémon. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

text.en: Heal 120 damage from 1 of your Benched {P} Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 120 dégâts de l'un de vos Pokémon {P} de Banc.

flavor_text.en: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

text.en: Discard up to 2 Energy cards from this Pokémon, and this attack does 120 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
text.fr: Défaussez jusqu'à 2 cartes Énergie de ce Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 120 dégâts pour chaque carte défaussée de cette façon.

text.en: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck un Pokémon de base, puis placez-le sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon lives in dark places untouched by sunlight. When it appears before humans, it hides itself under a cloth that resembles a Pikachu.

text.en: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 10 dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: The more sweet aromas it absorbs, the more its body swells. Milcery will deflate when its energy level drops.

text.en: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Pokémon in play.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chacun de vos Pokémon en jeu.

flavor_text.en: Desserts that Alcremie have decorated with their cream have a rich, sweet flavor and bring happiness to all who eat them.

text.en: If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: S'il reste 3 cartes Récompense ou moins à votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Able to cut down anything with a single strike, it became known as the Fairy King's Sword, and it inspired awe in friend and foe alike.

text.en: Place 1 damage counter on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
text.fr: Placez un marqueur de dégâts sur l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon.
It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it.

text.en: This attack does 40 damage for each of your Pokémon that has "Tauros" in its name that has any damage counters on it.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts pour chacun de vos Pokémon ayant " Tauros " dans leur nom et ayant au moins un marqueur de dégâts.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 20 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon has a muscular body and excels at close-quarters combat. It uses its short horns to strike the opponent's weak spots.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Empoisonné.

flavor_text.en: It builds its nest on a steep cliff. When it is done gliding, it hops along the ground back to its nest.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Empoisonné. Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon-là ne peut pas battre en retraite.

flavor_text.en: If it succeeds in catching even a faint breeze properly, it can circle the globe without flapping once.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It patiently awaits prey inside its funnel- shaped nest.
Rather than using its underdeveloped wings for flight, it rubs them together, emitting ultrasonic waves to attack its enemies.
Known as the Desert Spirit, this Pokémon hides in the sandstorms it causes by beating its wings.
It wraps its opponent in its gas-like body, slowly weakening its prey by poisoning it through the skin.
It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.

text.en: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Déplacez une Énergie de ce Pokémon vers l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

text.en: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack does 120 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies de ce Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 120 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: It is merciless by nature. It is said that it never forgives the mistakes of its Murkrow followers.

text.en: If you have any Stage 2 {D} Pokémon on your Bench, this attack does 70 more damage.
text.fr: Si vous avez au moins un Pokémon {D} de Niveau 2 sur votre Banc, cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It dwells in the darkness of caves. It uses its sharp claws to dig up gems to nourish itself.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 10 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: These Pokémon have sharp fangs and powerful jaws. Sailors avoid Carvanha dens at all costs.

text.en: Draw 2 cards.
text.fr: Piochez 2 cartes.

text.en: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 150 more damage.
text.fr: Si au moins un marqueur de dégâts est placé sur ce Pokémon, cette attaque inflige 150 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It sharpens its swordlike tail on hard rocks. It hides in tall grass and strikes unwary prey with venomous fangs.

text.en: Draw 2 cards.
text.fr: Piochez 2 cartes.

flavor_text.en: Because of this Pokémon's ability to detect danger, people mistook Absol as a bringer of doom.
It submerges itself in sand and moves as if swimming. This wise behavior keeps its enemies from finding it and maintains its temperature.
Protected by thin membranes, their eyes can see even in the dead of night. They live in groups of a few individuals.

text.en: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 160 more damage.
text.fr: Si au moins l'un de vos Pokémon a été mis K.O. par les dégâts d'une attaque pendant le dernier tour de votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige 160 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: After clamping down with its powerful jaws, it twists its body around to rip its prey in half.

text.en: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 2 Pokémon de base, puis placez-les sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: It has no problem drinking dirty water. An organ inside Toxel's body filters such water into a poisonous liquid that is harmless to Toxel.
As it scatters toxic sweat and emits electricity, a melody that sounds like it came from a guitar reverberates through the surrounding area.

text.en: Discard a Stadium in play.
text.fr: Défaussez un Stade en jeu.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est pile, pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas utiliser d'attaques.

flavor_text.en: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 60 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 60 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts infligés à ce Pokémon par des attaques.

flavor_text.en: Ancient people believed that the pattern on Bronzor's back contained a mysterious power.

text.en: Draw 3 cards.
text.fr: Piochez 3 cartes.

text.en: This attack does 40 damage for each Pokémon Tool attached to all Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts pour chaque Outil Pokémon attaché à tous les Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: In ages past, this Pokémon was revered as a bringer of rain. It was found buried in the ground.

text.en: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck un Pokémon, montrez-le, puis ajoutez-le à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: When it's in trouble, it curls up into a ball, makes its fur spikes stand on end, and then discharges electricity indiscriminately.

text.en: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez une Énergie du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: Duraludon's body is comprised of a special metal that's lightweight and scratch resistant. It's also smooth, as though it was given a mirror finish.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts infligés à ce Pokémon par des attaques de Pokémon de base.

flavor_text.en: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.

text.en: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu'à obtenir un côté pile. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

text.en: This attack does 40 damage for each of your Pokémon in play that has the Round attack.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts pour chacun de vos Pokémon en jeu ayant l'attaque Chant Canon.

flavor_text.en: It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a body slam.

text.en: Choose a random card from your opponent's hand, and your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into their deck.
text.fr: Choisissez une carte au hasard dans la main de votre adversaire. Votre adversaire montre cette carte, puis la mélange avec son deck.

flavor_text.en: It lives atop tall trees. When leaping from branch to branch, it deftly uses its tail for balance.

text.en: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack does 60 damage to each of 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies de ce Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige à 2 des Pokémon de votre adversaire 60 dégâts chacun. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: They live on large trees. They are said to communicate by connecting their tails to those of others.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. Attach an amount of Basic Energy up to the number of heads from your discard pile to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Attachez à vos Pokémon de Banc une quantité d'Énergies de base de votre pile de défausse inférieure ou égale au nombre de côtés face obtenus, comme il vous plaît.

flavor_text.en: Once a Smeargle reaches adulthood, it will have other members of its species leave paw prints on its back.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: A Pokémon with abundant curiosity. It shows an interest in everything, so it always zigzags.
It uses its explosive speed and razor-sharp claws to bring down prey. Running along winding paths is not its strong suit.

text.en: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Échangez ce Pokémon contre l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

flavor_text.en: Buneary can attack by rolling up their ears and then striking with the force created by unrolling them. This attack becomes stronger with training.

text.en: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 170 more damage.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a été déplacé de votre Banc vers le Poste Actif pendant ce tour, cette attaque inflige 170 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont affectés par aucun effet en action sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

rules_text.en: Prevent all damage counters from being placed on Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) by effects of attacks and Abilities from the opponent's Pokémon. (Damage from attacks is still taken.)
rules_text.fr: Empêchez que tout marqueur de dégâts soit placé sur les Pokémon de Banc (les vôtres et ceux de votre adversaire) par les effets des attaques et des talents des Pokémon de votre adversaire. (Les dégâts des attaques continuent de s'appliquer.)

rules_text.en:
You can use this card only if you discard a Basic {R} Energy card from your hand.

Discard a Pokémon Tool or Special Energy card from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon, or discard a Stadium in play.
rules_text.fr:
Vous ne pouvez utiliser cette carte que si vous défaussez une carte Énergie {R} de base de votre main.

Défaussez une carte Outil Pokémon ou Énergie spéciale de l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire, ou défaussez un Stade en jeu.

rules_text.en: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, a Stage 1 Pokémon, and a Stage 2 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
rules_text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck un Pokémon de base, un Pokémon de Niveau 1 et un Pokémon de Niveau 2, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

rules_text.en: Confused Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) don't recover from that Special Condition when they evolve or devolve.
rules_text.fr: Les Pokémon Confus (les vôtres et ceux de votre adversaire) ne guérissent pas de cet État Spécial lorsqu'ils évoluent ou dés-évoluent.

rules_text.en: Search your deck for up to 7 Basic {R} Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
rules_text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 7 cartes Énergie {R} de base, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

rules_text.en: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck and put a {D} Pokémon you find there onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards and put them on the bottom of your deck. You can't use this card during your first turn.
rules_text.fr: Regardez les 7 cartes du dessus de votre deck et placez un Pokémon {D} que vous y trouvez sur votre Banc. Mélangez les autres cartes et placez-les en dessous de votre deck. Vous ne pouvez pas utiliser cette carte pendant votre premier tour.

rules_text.en: Heal 80 damage from your Active Pokémon that has 3 or more Energy attached.
rules_text.fr: Soignez 80 dégâts de votre Pokémon Actif ayant 3 Énergies attachées ou plus.

rules_text.en: If the {D} Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), place 4 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.
rules_text.fr: Si le Pokémon {D} auquel cette carte est attachée est sur le Poste Actif et qu'il subit les dégâts d'une attaque de l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire (même si ce Pokémon est mis K.O.), placez 4 marqueurs de dégâts sur le Pokémon Attaquant.

rules_text.en: The Pokémon this card is attached to takes 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that have an Ability (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
rules_text.fr: Le Pokémon auquel cette carte est attachée subit 30 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques des Pokémon de votre adversaire ayant un talent (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

rules_text.en: Attach a Basic {P} Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched {P} Pokémon.
rules_text.fr: Attachez une carte Énergie {P} de base de votre pile de défausse à l'un de vos Pokémon {P} de Banc.

flavor_text.en: There are structures throughout its whole body that produce energy when hit by sound waves with a cheerful rhythm.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it's in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It sleeps under shallow ocean waters during the day, then looks for food at night when it's colder.

text.en: Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck une carte Supporter, montrez-la, puis ajoutez-la à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: A poor walker, it often falls down. However, its strong pride makes it puff up its chest without a care.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: This gluttonous Pokémon only assists people with their work because it wants treats. As it runs, it crackles with electricity.

text.en: If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: S'il reste 3 cartes Récompense ou moins à votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Able to cut down anything with a single strike, it became known as the Fairy King's Sword, and it inspired awe in friend and foe alike.
Known as the Desert Spirit, this Pokémon hides in the sandstorms it causes by beating its wings.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It's dangerous for Wooper to travel alone. They line up in groups of three or four and help each other as they walk around the wetlands.
As it scatters toxic sweat and emits electricity, a melody that sounds like it came from a guitar reverberates through the surrounding area.

text.en: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck un Pokémon, montrez-le, puis ajoutez-le à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: When it's in trouble, it curls up into a ball, makes its fur spikes stand on end, and then discharges electricity indiscriminately.

text.en: This attack does 40 damage for each of your Pokémon in play that has the Round attack.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts pour chacun de vos Pokémon en jeu ayant l'attaque Chant Canon.

flavor_text.en: It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a body slam.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It loves things that sparkle. When it sees a shiny object, the gold coin on its head shines, too.

text.en: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack does 60 damage to each of 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies de ce Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige à 2 des Pokémon de votre adversaire 60 dégâts chacun. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: They live on large trees. They are said to communicate by connecting their tails to those of others.

text.en: If this Pokémon was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does that much more damage.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a subi les dégâts d'une attaque pendant le dernier tour de votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige en plus ce montant-là de dégâts.

text.en: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.
text.fr: Défaussez les 2 cartes du dessus du deck de votre adversaire.

text.en: Discard any amount of {R} Energy from among your Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
text.fr: Défaussez autant d'Énergies {R} que vous le voulez parmi vos Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts pour chaque carte défaussée de cette façon.

text.en: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez toutes les Énergies de ce Pokémon.

text.en: You may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.
text.fr: Vous pouvez piocher des cartes jusqu'à en avoir 6 en main.

text.en: Draw 2 cards.
text.fr: Piochez 2 cartes.

text.en: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 150 more damage.
text.fr: Si au moins un marqueur de dégâts est placé sur ce Pokémon, cette attaque inflige 150 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 60 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 60 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

text.en: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 170 more damage.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a été déplacé de votre Banc vers le Poste Actif pendant ce tour, cette attaque inflige 170 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont affectés par aucun effet en action sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

rules_text.en: Prevent all damage counters from being placed on Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) by effects of attacks and Abilities from the opponent's Pokémon. (Damage from attacks is still taken.)
rules_text.fr: Empêchez que tout marqueur de dégâts soit placé sur les Pokémon de Banc (les vôtres et ceux de votre adversaire) par les effets des attaques et des talents des Pokémon de votre adversaire. (Les dégâts des attaques continuent de s'appliquer.)

rules_text.en:
You can use this card only if you discard a Basic {R} Energy card from your hand.

Discard a Pokémon Tool or Special Energy card from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon, or discard a Stadium in play.
rules_text.fr:
Vous ne pouvez utiliser cette carte que si vous défaussez une carte Énergie {R} de base de votre main.

Défaussez une carte Outil Pokémon ou Énergie spéciale de l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire, ou défaussez un Stade en jeu.

rules_text.en: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, a Stage 1 Pokémon, and a Stage 2 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
rules_text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck un Pokémon de base, un Pokémon de Niveau 1 et un Pokémon de Niveau 2, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

rules_text.en: Search your deck for up to 7 Basic {R} Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
rules_text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 7 cartes Énergie {R} de base, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

rules_text.en: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck and put a {D} Pokémon you find there onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards and put them on the bottom of your deck. You can't use this card during your first turn.
rules_text.fr: Regardez les 7 cartes du dessus de votre deck et placez un Pokémon {D} que vous y trouvez sur votre Banc. Mélangez les autres cartes et placez-les en dessous de votre deck. Vous ne pouvez pas utiliser cette carte pendant votre premier tour.

rules_text.en: If the {D} Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), place 4 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.
rules_text.fr: Si le Pokémon {D} auquel cette carte est attachée est sur le Poste Actif et qu'il subit les dégâts d'une attaque de l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire (même si ce Pokémon est mis K.O.), placez 4 marqueurs de dégâts sur le Pokémon Attaquant.

rules_text.en: The Pokémon this card is attached to takes 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that have an Ability (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
rules_text.fr: Le Pokémon auquel cette carte est attachée subit 30 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques des Pokémon de votre adversaire ayant un talent (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

rules_text.en: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
rules_text.fr: Échangez votre Pokémon Actif contre l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

rules_text.en:
If this card is attached to 1 of your Pokémon, discard it at the end of your turn.

As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides {C} Energy.

If this card is attached to an Evolution Pokémon, it provides {C}{C}{C} Energy instead.
rules_text.fr:
Si cette carte est attachée à l'un de vos Pokémon, défaussez-la à la fin de votre tour.

Tant que cette carte est attachée à un Pokémon, elle fournit une Énergie {C}.

Si cette carte est attachée à un Pokémon Évolutif, elle fournit 3 Énergies {C} à la place.

text.en: Discard any amount of {R} Energy from among your Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
text.fr: Défaussez autant d'Énergies {R} que vous le voulez parmi vos Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts pour chaque carte défaussée de cette façon.

text.en: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez toutes les Énergies de ce Pokémon.

text.en: Draw 2 cards.
text.fr: Piochez 2 cartes.

text.en: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 150 more damage.
text.fr: Si au moins un marqueur de dégâts est placé sur ce Pokémon, cette attaque inflige 150 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 170 more damage.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a été déplacé de votre Banc vers le Poste Actif pendant ce tour, cette attaque inflige 170 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont affectés par aucun effet en action sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

rules_text.en: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, a Stage 1 Pokémon, and a Stage 2 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
rules_text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck un Pokémon de base, un Pokémon de Niveau 1 et un Pokémon de Niveau 2, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

text.en: Discard any amount of {R} Energy from among your Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
text.fr: Défaussez autant d'Énergies {R} que vous le voulez parmi vos Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts pour chaque carte défaussée de cette façon.
